## Changes compared to v34.1.0

### Components

- cluster-cloud-director from v3.1.3 to v3.1.4

### cluster-cloud-director [v3.1.3...v3.1.4](https://github.com/giantswarm/cluster-cloud-director/compare/v3.1.3...v3.1.4)
